data.body: Archiving: work is complete and shipped. Delivered via PR navapbc/oscer#723 (target bumped v0.19.0 -> v0.20.0), which merged 2026-06-30 and resolved #722. Provider-v6 applied plan-gated across all infra layers (account/network/database dev+sandbox) 2026-06-30. The remaining-items list from prior comments is fully closed out: superseded Dependabot #705 handled during triage, and the DDE-vs-DocAI reconciliation cleared when PR #679 merged (2026-07-06). Nothing left to do.
